introduction:
In Telangana, the Ration Card is officially termed as the Food Security Card (FSC). It is issued by the Department of Consumer Affairs, Food & Civil Supplies, Government of Telangana. The FSC guarantees highly subsidized or free essential commodities (rice, wheat, sugar) through the State's ePOS-enabled Public Distribution System.

The Food Security Card serves as a paramount identity and socio-economic proof for availing welfare schemes like Arogyasri Health Insurance, Fee Reimbursement, and housing schemes in Telangana.
quickFacts:
Important to Know
  • Service fee at Meeseva centers is merely ₹35 to ₹45
  • Average processing takes 30 to 45 working days or longer during intensive state surveys
  • The authorized way to apply is entirely through Meeseva Centers / CSCs
  • Linking Aadhaar is mandatory for all listed beneficiaries
  • Helpline: 1967 or 1800-425-00333
documentsRequired:
Documents Required for Food Security Card (FSC)

Note: Keep original documents ready for scanning at the Meeseva center.
Identity Proof
  • Aadhaar Card of all family members
  • Voter ID Card
  • PAN Card
  • Driving Licence / Passport
Address Proof
  • Recent Electricity Bill or Property Tax Receipt
  • Telephone / Gas Connection Bill
  • Registered Rental Agreement
  • Bank Passbook (First page showing address)
Income & Other Documents
  • Income Certificate (Issued by Tahsildar / Meeseva) is critical for FSC.
  • Recent passport size photograph of the Head of the Family.
  • Surrender/Deletion Certificate (if modifying existing family structures).
Card Categories
  • FSC (Food Security Card): Standard Pink/White equivalent for NFSA eligible families.
  • AFSC (Antyodaya Food Security Card): For the poorest families (AAY). Provides max quota.
  • AAP (Annapurna): Destitute citizens above 65 years.
onlineApplication:
Method 1: Apply via Meeseva Center (Assisted Online Mode)

Direct online self-registration for new Food Security Cards is heavily restricted. The government mandates applying through an authorized Meeseva portal operated by an agent.

Step-by-Step Process:
  1. Visit Meeseva Center
    Locate your nearest authorized Meeseva center. Bring all your original documents.
  2. Operator Data Entry
    Ask for "Issue of New Food Security Card". The operator logs into the Meeseva portal. Provide the family head's details and all members' Aadhaar details for entry.
  3. Document Scanning
    The operator will scan your Aadhaar, Income Certificate, Address Proof, and Photograph directly into the system.
  4. Payment & MeeSeva Receipt
    Pay the nominal convenience fee to the operator. Collect the printed Meeseva Acknowledgement Receipt that contains a unique Application Number / Transaction ID.
  5. Revenue Inspector (RI) Verification
    The application is forwarded electronically to the local Tahsildar / Civil Supplies Office. An RI will conduct a physical home verification to confirm your income and address.
Tip: An updated Income Certificate from Meeseva significantly expedites the FSC verification. Ensure you specify your current gas connection details accurately.
offlineApplication:
Method 2: Apply via Praja Palana Camps / Tahsildar Office

During specific government drives (like Praja Palana or Grama Sabhas), offline applications are accepted widely. Otherwise, you can submit an application directly at the Tahsildar office.

Step-by-Step Process:
  1. Collect FSC Application Form
    Obtain the offline "Application for Food Security Card" from the Tahsildar (MRO) Office or during a special grievance camp.
  2. Fill in the Details Carefully
    Fill the exact details matching the Aadhaar Card. List the eldest female as the head of the family. Mention the nearest Fair Price Shop number.
  3. Attach Attested Copies
    Staple clear photocopies of Aadhaar cards of all members, Income Certificate, and a recent utility bill. Affix a passport photo of the Head of Family.
  4. Submit Application
    Submit the complete bundle to the Civil Supplies Wing at the Tahsildar Office. Ensure you receive an acknowledgement receipt with a date stamp.
  5. Verification & Issuance
    The Village Revenue Officer/Revenue Inspector (VRO/RI) evaluates the application. Once approved, the data is pushed to the central EPDS server for card generation.
Processing Time: Processing via Tahsildar takes roughly 45 working days, heavily depending on the availability of the RI for verification.
afterApplying:
After Applying — What Next?

Track Application Status

Visit the official portal epds.telangana.gov.in.
Click on FSC Search \u2192 FSC Application Search. Select your district and search by your Meeseva/Application number to check the exact status.

Download E-Ration Card (FSC)

Once approved, you can download your FSC directly from the EPDS portal using the "FSC Download" option. This printout serves as a valid document at the FPS.

Arogyasri Integration

Your Food Security Card is simultaneously linked with the Arogyasri Health Care portal. Once you have the FSC, you're usually entitled to free healthcare benefits automatically.

Grievance Redressal / T-App Folio

Download the official T-App Folio to view services. For complaints and delays, use the state consumer helpline 1967.
